import json
import cProfile
import pstats


def process_data(items: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    profiler = cProfile.Profile()
    profiler.enable()
    results = []
    seen = set()
    for item in items:
        key = item["id"]
        if key not in seen:
            seen.add(key)
            results.append(transform(item))
    profiler.disable()
    stats = pstats.Stats(profiler)
    stats.sort_stats("cumulative")
    stats.print_stats(10)
    return results


def transform(item: dict) -> dict:
    return {k: v for k, v in item.items() if v is not None}


def find_duplicates(records: list[dict]) -> list[dict]:
    profiler = cProfile.Profile()
    profiler.enable()
    counts = {}
    for rec in records:
        key = rec.get("email", "")
        counts[key] = counts.get(key, 0) + 1
    duplicates = [r for r in records if counts.get(r.get("email", ""), 0) > 1]
    profiler.disable()
    stats = pstats.Stats(profiler)
    stats.sort_stats("cumulative")
    stats.print_stats(10)
    return duplicates


def aggregate_metrics(data_points: list[float]) -> dict:
    profiler = cProfile.Profile()
    profiler.enable()
    total = sum(data_points)
    count = len(data_points)
    profiler.disable()
    stats = pstats.Stats(profiler)
    stats.sort_stats("cumulative")
    stats.print_stats(5)
    return {"mean": total / count, "total": total, "count": count}
